Title: The Fantastic Four: First Steps
Writer: Josh Friedman, Eric Pearson, Jeff Kaplan
Actors: Pedro Pascal, Vanessa Kirby, Ebon Moss-Bachrach
Plot: Forced to balance their roles as heroes with the strength of their family bond, the Fantastic Four must defend Earth from a ravenous space god called Galactus and his enigmatic herald, the Silver Surfer.
Country: United Kingdom, United States, Canada, New Zealand
